name: cc-tools
description: cc-tools — the tools layer of the cc-* harness: philosophy-agnostic helpers usable in any project. /crux unwinds a pain, doubt, or blockage into ONE diagnosis and angle of attack; /slap resets a fix stuck in a rabbit hole; /cc-init is the onboarding orchestrator — it explains the four plugins, installs dependencies and recommended tools, then runs three setup skills (/rules-management installs recommended + project rules, /cheatsheet-management builds the reminder cheat-sheet, /docs-management finds stale prose) and offers /roadmap-management; plus a set of recommended project rules installed into .claude/rules/. The product funnel lives in cc-funnel; the musician (cc-agent) drives it; cc-maestro supervises.
